member.name: T:UrlShortener.Infrastructure.Services.CachingService
member.summary: Redis implementation of the cache service. Uses IDistributedCache and JSON serialization for storing objects.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Infrastructure.Services.CachingService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Distributed.IDistributedCache)
member.summary: Redis implementation of the cache service. Uses IDistributedCache and JSON serialization for storing objects.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Infrastructure.Services.MassTransitMessagePublisher
member.summary: Message publisher implementation based on MassTransit. Publishes integration events to RabbitMQ.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Infrastructure.Services.MassTransitMessagePublisher.#ctor(MassTransit.IPublishEndpoint)
member.summary: Message publisher implementation based on MassTransit. Publishes integration events to RabbitMQ.
